table.documentation: Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Associates threads with their owning process.
Associates processes with their process names.

Provides modelers with a regular reference time for modeling fixed time-based statistics. The ticks are evenly spaced with a configurable frequency specifying the number of events to generate per second, so a tick schema with a frequency of 10 will generate a row every 100ms.

Provides modelers with a regular reference time for modeling fixed time-based statistics. The ticks are evenly spaced with a configurable frequency specifying the number of events to generate per second, so a tick schema with a frequency of 10 will generate a row every 100ms.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Holds a raw CPU profiling sample with additional sampled counter values.
Associates numeric arguments with strings in kdebug trace points.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Identifies where an application is in its lifecycle.
When combined with other cpu-profile samples, creates a statistical picture of where your application is spending its time.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
Tracing the kernel and some system frameworks.
